'''Tam Gozon''' was one of the co-directors of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]]. [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] him, along with the other co-directors, in the Combine's headquarters during the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

Tam's [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were indicative of a [[Salt/Legends|salt]] addiction, not uncommon among [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]].
